title: SAPX secures revolving loan of IDR 125 billion
body: PT Satria Antaran Prima Tbk (SAPX) managed to obtain a revolving loan facility of IDR 125 billion from PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI) yesterday (25/6).

title: Waskita Karya to inject IDR 10 billion for Kapal Betung Toll Road
body: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), through its subsidiary, PT Waskita Toll Road (WTR), has channelled extra capital worth IDR 10 billion to PT Waskita Sriwijaya Toll (WST), a business entity that owns the concession of Kayu Agung–Palembang–Betung (Kapal Betung) Toll Road.

title: Trimegah Bangun Persada to raise buyback budget to IDR 1 trillion
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL) has increased the allocated fund for share buyback to IDR 1 trillion from the initial IDR 400 billion.

title: Continuing to release Totalindo (TOPS) shares, Deputy Attorney General for Special Crimes now only holds 5.79 percent
body: The Deputy Attorney General for Special Crimes of the Prosecutor's Office of the Republic of Indonesia had not stopped selling shares of PT Totalindo Eka Persada Tbk (TOPS), an issuer of building construction. On Friday, June 21, this investor released an additional 70 million shares, bringing its total number of shares held to 1.93 billion, or approximately 5.79%. Besides that, Tan John Tanuwijaya, the majority shareholder in PT Berdikari Pondasi Perkasa Tbk (BDKR), was still selling shares, this time for 27.54 million. His share percentage was recorded as being around 58.89%. PT Precise Pacific Realty was also recorded as selling 20 million shares of the tourism services company PT Sona Topas Tourism Industry Tbk (SONA), with the remaining shares amounting to approximately 31.65%.

title: Distribute financing to 900 thousand MSMEs, KoinWorks launches Impact Report 2023
body: KoinWorks, a peer-to-peer (P2P) lending fintech that was founded in 2016, has just launched the 2023 Impact Report which displays the company's social impact throughout 2023 after distributing financing facilities to more than 900 thousand MSMEs (Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises).

title: BREN shares move up after FCA
body: PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) shares closed at IDR 9,650, up IDR 250, from IDR 9,400 at the closing bell yesterday (24/6).

title: Pondok Indah to continue 8 property project development
body: PT Metropolitan Kentjana Tbk (MKPI), the managing company of Pondok Indah property, will resume the development of 8 property projects in Jakarta.

title: Prodia Diagnostic Line hosts topping-off for new production facility, targeting TKDN above 60%
body: PT Prodia Diagnostic Line (Proline), "sister company" of PT Prodia Widyahusada Tbk (PRDA) which is engaged in manufacturing reagents and test equipment, has just held the topping off of its newest production facility building today (25/6) in the Jababeka area, Cikarang.

title: Asahimas Flat Glass to distribute cash dividend of IDR 34.72 billion
body: PT Asahimas Flat Glass Tbk (AMFG), a manufacturer of glass for building and vehicles, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 34.72 billion or IDR 80 per share taken out of its net profit in 2023.

title: Impack Pratama to acquire Mulford Holdings for IDR 808 billion
body: PT Impack Pratama Industri Tbk (IMPC), a manufacturer of building and plastic materials, will take over 100% of Mulford Holdings Pty. Ltd. (MH) with total transaction value of IDR 808 billion.

title: Up 20.22%, MKPI to share dividend of IDR 507.27 billion
body: PT Metropolitan Kentjana Tbk (MKPI) is allocating dividend of IDR 507.28 billion for the fiscal year (FY) 2023, 20.22% higher than the dividend allocation in FY 2022 of IDR 421.94 billion.

title: AMMN’s president director to restructure shares for estate planning
body: Alexander Ramlie, President Director of PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN), transferred his shares in AMMN to his foreign-based companies for estate planning earlier today (25/6).

title: IDX to put 5 issuers under special supervision
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) is monitoring 5 issuers closely after they are listed under the category of facing Suspension of Debt Payment Obligation (PKPU) lawsuit, bankruptcy, and cancellation of homologated agreement

title: PTPP to issue Bonds of IDR 434.62 billion for refinancing obligations
body: PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) will issue Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase I Year 2024 of IDR 434.62 billion.

title: Protelindo and Iforte bags loan facility of USD 130 million from MUFG
body: PT Profesional Telekomunikasi Indonesia (Protelindo) and PT Iforte Solusi Infotek (Iforte) have signed a loan facility agreement worth USD 130 million from MUFG Bank Ltd., Jakarta Branch.

title: Foreign buy and sell volumes fall, net foreign volume closed at -242.58 million shares
body: Compared to the previous trading day, foreign share buying and selling activities on Monday, June 24, were significantly lower, with foreign buying volume of only 2.14 billion shares and foreign selling volume of 2.38 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended at -242.58 million shares. The shares with the highest purchases belonged to the e-commerce company PT Bukalapak.com Tbk (BUKA), which was purchased for 136.82 million shares with a net volume of 85.71 million shares, while the shares sold the most belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with a foreign sales volume of 904.88 million shares and a net volume of -312.03 million shares.

title: Summarecon Agung to channel dividend of IDR 148.57 billion
body: PT Summarecon Agung Tbk (SMRA), a real estate developer and management company, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 148.57 billion or IDR 9 per share for the fiscal year (FY) 2023.

title: Teladan Investama acquires 2.77 billion shares of NET TV from Sinergi Lintas Media
body: On Thursday, June 20, the controller of media holding company PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV) transferred more than 2.77 billion shares to a new investor. The new investor was PT Teladan Investama, which acquired these shares from the controller, PT Sinergi Lintas Media, giving it approximately 11.84% ownership. Sinergi Lintas Media's ownership of NETV shares then fell from 71.43% to 59.58%.

title: Share purchase transactions reaches 10 billion, net foreign volume posts surplus at 1.19 billion
body: On Friday, June 21, foreign investors made share purchases, totaling up to 10.28 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume only totaled 9.08 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 1.19 billion shares. The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the most shares purchased, totaling 6.75 billion shares and a net volume of 382.71 million shares.

title: Jembo Cable (JECC) stock split 1:5, and two investors' share volume increased significantly
body: On Wednesday, June 19, two large investors in PT Jembo Cable Company Tbk (JECC) saw a significant increase in their shares. This was the outcome of a 1:5 stock split carried out by this electrical and communications cable manufacturer. First, an investor named PT Monaspermata Persada gained 285.94 million more shares, bringing the total to 357.42 million, though its ownership remained at 47.28%. In addition, PT Indolife Pensiontama's total shares increased from 26.57 million to 132.89 million, accounting for 17.58% of the stake.

title: Absent for three years, JSPT to share dividend of IDR 23.18 billion
body: Shareholders of PT Jakarta Setiabudi Internasional Tbk (JSPT) agreed to distribute cash dividend of IDR 23.18 billion for the fiscal year (FY) 2023.

title: UBC Medical Indonesia to offer 17.72% shares in IPO
body: PT UBC Medical Indonesia Tbk (LABS), a medical device distributor, will offer 700 million shares through initial public offering (IPO).

title: 4 state-owned construction companies struggle since COVID-19
body: The stock of four state-owned construction companies were still plummeting since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic in 2020.

title: Equity deemed sufficient, ADHI to pay maturing bonds of IDR 473.5 billion
body: PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) pays off its Series B of Shelf-Registration Bond II Phase II Year 2019 worth IDR 473.5 billion.

title: TAPG to join hands with Aisin Takaoka to produce biocoke from palm shells
body: PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG) works with Aisin Takaoka Co, Ltd to produce biocoke from palm shells in Indonesia.

title: Capital deficiency detected, IDX to monitor 11 issuers closely
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) puts 11 issuers under close monitoring due to capital deficiencies recorded in issued Financial Reports as of June 21.

title: Waskita Toll Road to swap debts of IDR 1.72 trillion to extra capital
body: PT Waskita Toll Road (WTR), a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT) engaged in toll road business, has converted the debt of its subsidiary, PT Waskita Bumi Wira (WBW), to extra equity (debt-to-equity swap).

title: Jumbo dividend in sight, UNVR saw uptrend in stock price
body: PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk (UNVR) were seen climbing at today’s (24/6) morning session following shareholders’ decision to set dividend 8.45% higher for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 compared to FY 2022.

title: Simplifying business, YELO to divest subsidiary for IDR 20.59 billion
body: PT Yelooo Integra Datanet Tbk (YELO) has divested its entire portion in PT Telemedia Komunikasi Pratama (TKP) to PT Dharma Sinar Semesta (DSS) with total transaction value of IDR 20.59 billion.

title: Cap Tikus manufacturer to distribute dividend of IDR 1.64 billion
body: PT Jobubu Jarum Minahasa Tbk (BEER), an alcoholic beverage manufacturer known through the brand Cap Tikus, will channel out cash dividend of IDR 1.64 billion or IDR 0.41 per share.

title: Blibli.com to acquire Dekoruma for IDR 1.16 trillion
body: PT Global Digital Niaga Tbk (BELI), the owner of e-commerce platform Blibli.com, has reportedly acquired Dekoruma with a transaction value of IDR 1.16 trillion.

title: Net foreign volume posts surplus of 58.12 million shares
body: After days of being in the red zone, net foreign volume on Thursday, June 20, finally entered the green zone, although with just 58.12 million shares. The foreign buying volume was around 3.50 billion shares, while the foreign selling volume was 3.44 billion shares. Foreign investors then began buying shares by purchasing 105.69 million shares of domestic and foreign shipping services company PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL), for a net volume of 83.21 million shares

title: PGAS secures LNG purchase contract
body: PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk (PGAS) and Tangguh PSC Contractor Parties reportedly signed a LNG purchase framework contract via Master Ex-Ship LNG Sale and Purchase Agreement (MSA) yesterday (19/6).

title: Gov’t to hold another SUN auction next week, eyeing IDR 22 trillion
body: Indonesian Government once again holds an auction of Government Securities (SUN) next Tuesday (25/6) with an indicative target of IDR 22 trillion.

title: NICL to extend completion of SAM acquisition
body: PT PAM Mineral Tbk (NICL) and PT Sumber Mineral Abadi (SAM) agreed to extend the completion of the acquisition of 50% of SAM to May 30, 2025.

title: Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper to distribute cash dividend of IDR 273.55 billion
body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP), a paper manufacturer under Sinarmas Group, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 273.55 billion or IDR 50 per share.

title: Eyeing extra capital, BMTR to issue private placement
body: PT Global Mediacom Tbk (BMTR) seeks extra capital by issuing a maximum of 16.58 billion shares via a private placement.

title: Indo American Seafoods to issue 20.86% shares through IPO
body: PT Indo American Seafoods Tbk (ISEA), a shrimp cultivation company and shrimp-based processed food manufacturer, will issue 290 million shares through the initial public offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Unggul Indah Cahaya to distribute cash dividend of IDR 109.63 billion
body: PT Unggul Indah Cahaya Tbk (UNIC), an Indonesia-based detergent material manufacturer, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 109.63 billion or IDR 286 per share.

title: Adhi Karya to issue bonds of IDR 1 trillion for refinancing
body: PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI), a state-owned construction and property developer, will issue public offering of Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase I Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 1 trillion.

title: Taking up retained earning, Unilever to set final dividend to IDR 77 per share due July
body: PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk (UNVR) is readying final dividend of IDR 77 per share, or IDR 2.9 trillion in total, which will be taken out of its net profit in 2023, plus its retained earnings.

title: Aiming for IDR 200 billion, Bank UOB to offer bonds with highest coupon of 7.50%
body: PT Bank UOB Indonesia is issuing Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase I Year 2024 and Shelf-Registration Subordinated Bond IV Phase I Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 100 billion each.

title: Arkora Hydro to channel loans of IDR 50 billion to subsidiary
body: PT Arkora Hydro Tbk (AKRO) has signed a shareholder loan with one of its subsidiaries, PT Arkora Ekon Indonesia (AEKON), with credit ceiling maxed out to IDR 50 billion.

title: 3.18 billion Gojek Tokopedia shares sold, net foreign volume closed at -1.47 billion shares
body: On Wednesday, June 19, foreign investors sold the most shares in PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), a digital enterprise. Through this transaction, foreign investors sold 3.18 billion GOTO shares, resulting in a net volume of -1.11 billion shares. This was undoubtedly one of the causes of the high foreign sales volume, which totaled 5.49 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was only at 4.02 billion shares, leaving net foreign volume at -1.47 billion shares.

title: Panorama Destination (PDES) drawn in three major investors
body: Tourism services issuer PT Destinasi Tirta Nusantara Tbk (PDES), also known as Panorama Destination, welcomed three major investors on Friday, June 14. First, PT Aman Dhitya Investama purchased 47.50 million PDES shares using two securities, resulting in an immediate ownership of 6.64%. PT Golden Spice purchased PDES shares in the same volume, even using the same securities. Finally, PT Sentra Anugrah Nusantara purchased 39.43 million PDES shares, or 5.52% of the total, through PT Waterfront Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: A year debuting, RAAM distributes dividend of IDR 24.77 billion
body: PT Tripar Multivision Plus Tbk (RAAM) plans to share dividend of IDR 24.77 billion in fiscal year (FY) 2023 after a year debuting in the stock market on May 8, 2023.

title: Insist on investment for synergy, DIVA still at a loss
body: Although the revenue was slightly bumped 5% year-on-year (yoy) in Q1 2024, PT Distribusi Voucher Nusantara Tbk’s (DIVA) current year’s net loss severely worsened by dozens to minus IDR 168.25 billion.

title: Take a look at top 3 construction material company with jumbo dividends
body: Three construction material companies are revealed to distribute high amounts of dividends for fiscal year (FY) 2023. The issuers coincidentally have market capitalisations of over IDR 10 trillion.

title: Triggering performance contraction, NICE optimistic nickel fluctuation is only temporary
body: Just debuted via IPO on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (BEI) last January 9, PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) has experienced a contraction in its operational profit due to fluctuating nickel prices, which tend to be negative.

title: Capital expenditure investments take up a large portion, NICE withhold dividends
body: PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) has budgeted jumbo capital expenditure (capex) for the next three years, forcing it to withhold dividends for the 2023 financial year for the sake of stable working capital.

title: TBMS distributes US$ 1.83 million in dividends
body: PT Tembaga Mulia Semanan Tbk (TBMS) will distribute dividends of US$ 1.83 million in the 2023 financial year or 29.61% of the comprehensive profit of US$ 6.18 million.

title: Gunanusa Eramandiri (GUNA) to release 20% shares via IPO
body: PT Gunanusa Eramandiri Tbk (GUNA), a producer of packaged peanuts, will offer 500 million shares in an Initial Public Offering (IPO) on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (BEI).

title: ULTJ posts dividend IDR 415.9 billion, up 33.33%
body: PT Ultrajaya Milk Industry & Trading Company Tbk (ULTJ) dividends grew 33.33% to IDR 40 per share in the 2023 fiscal year from IDR 30 per share in the 2022 fiscal year.

title: Mitratel aims to collect IDR 500 billion through bond and sukuk issuance
body: PT Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Tbk (MTEL) will issue Shelf-Registration Bond I Phase I Year 2024 with a total principal of IDR 400 billion and Shelf-Registration Sukuk Ijarah Phase I Year 2024 of IDR 100 billion.

title: Expanding to Australia, PYFA wraps up Probiotec acquisition
body: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk’s (PYFA) steps in expanding the market to Australia is now materialised after acquiring the entire shares of Probiotic Limited, Australia.

title: Paramita Bangun Sarana distributes cash dividend of IDR 159 billion
body: PT Paramita Bangun Sarana Tbk (PBSA), a building construction company, will channel out cash dividend worth IDR 159 billion or IDR 53 per share.

title: Samudera Prawiradjaja acquires 41% of Campina (CAMP) shares from Sabana Prawira Widjaja
body: On Thursday, June 13, PT Campina Ice Cream Industry Tbk (CAMP) witnessed the acquisition of 2.41 billion of its shares. Sabana Prawira Widjaja, who had previously controlled 83.94% of CAMP's shares, transferred those shares to Samudera Prawirawidjaja, lowering his shareholding to 42.94%. Samudera now owns 41% of CAMP's shares.

title: Ciputra Development has used up IDR 700 billion for land acquisition
body: PT Ciputra Development Tbk (CTRA), a well-known property developer, has reportedly realised IDR 700 billion of its capital expenditure (capex) until first quarter (Q1) of 2024.

title: Take a peek into Ciputra Development’s marketing sales in Q1 2024
body: Amidst the slowing down of industry property post-COVID-19, PT Ciputra Development Tbk (CTRA) is one of the property developers showing stable performance.

title: CTRA to ready IDR 389 billion as dividend next July
body: PT Ciputra Development Tbk (CTRA) will allocate cash dividend of IDR 389 billion for the fiscal year 2023, up from IDR 278.35 billion in FY 2022. The dividend payment is scheduled to take place on July 19, 2024.

title: BALI’s dividend shrank 38.16% to IDR 78.69 billion
body: The dividend of PT Bali Towerindo Sentra Tbk (BALI) dropped 38.16% in fiscal year (FY) 2023 to IDR 78.69 billion from the fiscal year 2022 of IDR 127.25 billion.

title: Tommy Soeharto’s golf resort to debut, eyeing IDR 713 billion in IPO
body: PT Intra Golflink Resorts Tbk (GOLF), management consultancy and golf course management owned by Hutomo Mandala Putra or Tommy Soeharto, will issue 3.1 billion shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) through initial public offering (IPO).

title: January to May 2024, trade surplus slipped 20.74%
body: Statistics Indonesia (BPS) recorded trade surplus throughout January-May 2024 of USD 13.05 billion, down 20.47% from USD 16.47 billion seen in 5M 2023.

title: Profit down, Erajaya still distribute dividend of IDR 17 per share
body: Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) of PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA) distributes dividend of IDR 17 per share for the fiscal year (FY) 2023, down from IDR 19 per share allocated in FY 2022.

title: EV sales hit 2k units in Q1 2024, MCASH aim for double-digit growth in EBITDA
body: PT MCash Integrasi Tbk (MCAS), a parent entity of the manufacturer of Volta electric motorcycle, is targeting EBITDA to grow double-digit until the end of 2024.

title: Growing consistently, MTLA to distribute dividend of IDR 83.51 billion
body: PT Metropolitan Land Tbk (MTLA) will distribute dividend of IDR 83.51 billion in the fiscal year (FY) 2023, up 5.92% from the dividend allocated in FY 2022.

title: Protelindo to issue IDR 1 trillion bonds for refinancing
body: PT Profesional Telekomunikasi Indonesia (Protelindo), a subsidiary of PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR), will issue Shelf Registration Bonds IV Phase I in 2024 with a principal amount of IDR 1 trillion.

title: Imports decline 8.83% in May 2024
body: Total imports were corrected by 8.83% in May 2024 compared to May 2023, but grew compared to April 2024.

title: Garudafood to transfer assets worth IDR 78.75 billion to KEJU
body: PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD), a processed packaged food manufacturer, divests its land asset to PT Mulia Boga Raya Tbk (KEJU) with a transaction value of IDR 78.78 billion.

title: Two years absent, Suparma finally distribute dividend of IDR 37.84 billion
body: PT Suparma Tbk (SPMA) to finally channel out dividend of IDR 37.84 billion for the fiscal year (FY) 2023. For two years, since 2021, SPMA has been absent in dividend distribution to its shareholders.

title: One year into its debut, 4 stocks were seen plummeting
body: The stock price of four issuers debuting in the stock exchange in June 2023 were seen sinking, compared to its IPO price last year.

title: Mayora Indah to channel dividend of IDR 1.22 trillion
body: PT Mayora Indah Tbk (MYOR), a packaged food manufacturer that has been listed on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) since 1990, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 1.22 trillion.

title: HUMI to aim for 20% profit growth this year
body: PT Humpuss Maritim International Tbk (HUMI) will acquire several new vessels to attain the target of 20% profit growth at the end of 2024. The company reported net profit of 2023 of USD 10.41 million.

title: Demands in surge, MPX Logistics to acquire 50 new trucks
body: PT MPX Logistics Internasional Tbk (MPXL), a transportation and logistics company, adds 50 new trucks into its fleet to accommodate the surge in demands from coals and construction segments.

title: 3.24 billion shares of foreign sell volume resulted in net foreign of -545.83 million shares
body: Foreign share sales on Friday, June 14, generated a foreign selling volume of 3.24 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was only around 2.69 billion shares, leaving net foreign volume at -545.83 million shares. Unlike the previous day, shares of digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were the most acquired this day, totaling 1.39 billion shares with a net volume of 281.20 million.

title: Almost 3 billion Gojek Tokopedia shares are sold, net foreign volume falls to -1.49 billion shares
body: On Thursday, June 13, foreign investors sold 2.98 billion shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), for a net volume of -1.18 billion shares. These sales accounted for 65.53% of the entire foreign sales volume, which was 4.58 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buy volume was 3.09 billion shares, bringing the net foreign volume to -1.45 billion shares.

title: BNP Paribas Singapore sold 569 million Jaya Real Property (JRPT) shares
body: This time, market hints began with BP2S SG/BNP Paribas Singapore Branch Wealth Management selling 569.99 million shares of PT Jaya Real Property Tbk (JRPT), a property development company. As a result, this foreign investor's share portion decreased from 14.03% to 9.88% on Wednesday, June 12.

title: OMED to distribute cash dividend of IDR 77.93 billion
body: PT Jayamas Medica Industri Tbk (OMED), a health device manufacturer known with OneMed brand, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 77.93 billion or IDR 2.88 per share.

title: Foreign debt of USD 398.33 billion down 1.5% from last year
body: Foreign debts were recorded declining 1.5% to USD 398.33 billion as of April 2024 from USD 404.55 billion in April 2023.

title: TBLA to channel dividend of IDR 241 billion
body: PT Tunas Baru Lampung Tbk (TBLA) is distributing final cash dividend of IDR 241.01 billion from the net profit of 2023.

title: Lautan Luas to issue bond of IDR 300 billion for extra working capital
body: PT Lautan Luas Tbk (LTLS), a downstream integrated chemicals manufacturer, will issue Shelf-Registration IV Phase I Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 300 billion.

title: BUDI to set up total dividend of IDR 44.98 billion, up 25%
body: The dividend of PT Budi Starch & Sweetener Tbk (BUDI) increased 25% for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 from 2022. Prior to this, the dividend amount does not change for two consecutive years.

title: In need of extra capital, Fitra Hotel to set up rights issue of 50% shares
body: PT Hotel Fitra Internasional Tbk (FITT), the managing company of Hotel Fitra, is planning capital increase through pre-emptive rights or rights issue of 726.13 million shares or equal to 50% of issued and paid-up capital of the company.

title: JCI weakened this morning
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) slipped down at the opening bell this morning (14/6).

title: Wijaya Karya to converts subsidiary’s debts to extra equity
body: PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) has converted the debt of one of its subsidiaries, PT Wijaya Karya Industri Energi (WINNER), to extra capital, or debt-to-equity swap.

title: PBRX in PKPU status
body: Commercial Court of Central Jakarta approved the plea of Suspension of Debt Payment Obligation (PKPU) over PT Pan Brothers Tbk (PBRX) submitted by PT Januardi Putera Logistik (JPL).

title: Kedoya Adyaraya to set up final dividend of IDR 10.22 billion
body: PT Kedoya Adyaraya Tbk (RSGK), the operator of Grha Kedoya Hospital and Grha MM2100 Hospital, will distribute final dividend of IDR 10.22 billion or IDR 11 per share.

title: Tan John Tanuwijaya now only owns 62.45% of Berdikari Foundation (BDKR)
body: Tan John Tanuwijaya, the controlling shareholder in the foundation specialty company PT Berdikari Pondasi Perkasa Tbk (BDKR), released an additional 34.36 million shares on Tuesday, June 11. This investor's shareholding continues to fall as a result of his regular share sales; only 62.45% remains.

title: Net foreign volume stuck in red zone with -1.22 billion shares
body: The net foreign volume remained in the red zone, on Wednesday, June 12, totaling -1.22 billion shares. This figure was obtained from the difference in foreign buying volume, which was only 3 billion shares, and foreign selling volume, which reached 4.23 billion shares. The most shares sold belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), namely 2.29 billion shares, with a net volume of -703.12 million shares.

title: Prajogo Pangestu acquires two billion Barito Pacific (BRPT) shares
body: Prajogo Pangestu, the controlling shareholder of PT Barito Pacific Tbk (BRPT), added another 2 billion shares of the company, which operates in the energy and industrial sectors, to his holdings on Monday, June 10. Prajogo previously held approximately 69.05% of the shares but now owns 71.19%. Prajogo purchased shares through two securities companies: BUT Standard Chartered Bank and PT Bahana Sekuritas.
